title: Pan-Fried Cherry Tomatoes with Jiaozi Crust
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the sweetness of cherry tomatoes with the crunch of pan-fried jiaozi.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Pan-fry the jiaozi until crispy and golden, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Mince the garlic and sprinkle over the cherry tomatoes.
Sprinkle the Chinese five-spice powder over the cherry tomatoes and stir to combine.
Serve the cherry tomatoes with the crispy jiaozi on top.
